fields.success_message: I got the bank alert for a forgotten password. I went in and changed my password and called my bank. My bank said there was nothing else to do since I had changed my password and all account activity was normal. I re-logged into my bank account and then saw they had updated my phone number to their number.

fields.notification_message: Most borrowers, notwithstanding how well qualified or poorly qualified, will quietly suffer in anxious anticipation (some more quietly than others), for the coveted Loan Approval. During the approval process, and continuing on through the Closing
fields.success_message: Paragraph 8 FINANCING in both the AS IS and the Standard FR/BAR Contract* is the section of the Contract dealing with financing of a purchase by a Buyer. The purpose of seeking financing is to obtain approval for a loan, thereby permitting the Buyer to close on the Contract. This is defined under the Contract as the Loan Approval.
